Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Text Ruling

For Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled hearing for order to distribute settlement funds this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
J. Rae Lovko, Esq. for Plaintiff Angie Close.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Angie Close the heir of decedent Harry Close is entitled to 100% of the net settlement funds. Terms are listed on the ORDER filed and signed in open court.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
